subject: filter_quality removing all tiltseries upon use of --ntilts
body:
Hi everyone,

I'm trying to use warptools to select and deselect frames and tilts based 
on the outputted quality metrics.

For the frames, I was able to get a list of good frames and select them 
through change_selection. I wanted to confirm with those more knowledgeable 
if, by selecting only the frames that pass the filters, only those tilts 
would be included into the tilt series stack.

The main problem I am facing is when I use
WarpTools filter_quality --settings warp_tiltseries.settings --o 
quality_tilts.txt --ntilts "N"
the filter excludes all tilt series regardless of what the N value is.
For example: I have 8/48 tilt series with <30 tilts in the stack. I use 
--ntilts 8. It removes all 48. --ntilts 0 and --ntilts 48 also remove all 
48 tilt series. 

Am I using --ntilts incorrectly? Or is something else going on?

Daniel
